overrides.new: $ \text {is a useful pattern for matching a space at the end of a line, and /ˆThe dog}\backslash\text {.}\backslash$

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} x _ {1} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text { if   ``Case(w_{i}) = Lower'' } \\ 0 & \text { otherwise } \end{array} \right. \\ x _ {2} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text { if   ``w_{i} \in AcronymDict'' } \\ 0 & \text { otherwise } \end{array} \right. \\ x _ {3} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text { if   ``w_{i} = St.~\&~Case(w_{i-1}) = Upper''} \\ 0 & \text { otherwise } \end{array} \right. \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} x _ {1} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text { if ``Case(} w_{i} \text {) = Lower'' } \\ 0 & \text { otherwise } \end{array} \right. \\ x _ {2} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text { if ``} w_{i} \in \mathrm{AcronymDict} \text {'' } \\ 0 & \text { otherwise } \end{array} \right. \\ x _ {3} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text { if ``} w_{i} = \mathrm{St.}\ \&\ \mathrm{Case}(w_{i-1}) = \mathrm{Upper} \text {''} \\ 0 & \text { otherwise } \end{array} \right. \end{array}
